definitions.winrate_denominator: appearance-based; mirror matches count as one win and one loss across the two sides
definitions.last_standing_rate: sole-survivor wins divided by total appearances of that adventurer
definitions.average_dpm: average attributed damage dealt per adventurer appearance across all analyzed matches; end-of-round burn is excluded because the engine does not retain DOT ownership
